channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree blocking pavement, 25th June
item.description:
The growth around these two trees is forcing all residents to walk in the road and put themselves in danger on a blind corner. It is also completely inaccessible for anyone in a wheelchair. We would be grateful if someone could clear the vegetation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dayton Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken pavement., 25th June
item.description:
Broken pavement outside 2 Cornwallis Ave, the damage is cause by lorries parking on the pavement and footpath.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Cornwallis Avenue, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement swollen tarmac, 25th June
item.description:
Large mound
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Almond Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thames water signage, 25th June
item.description:
The diversion signage from Honor Oak Park towards Hengrave Road due to long term Thames water works is sending vehicles up the road which is closed at the junction with Honor Oak Park. Vehicles are driving up Hengrave Road from Boveney Road and then having to reverse back down on finding the road closed. The signage on Boveney Road is misleading suggesting the diversion ends here.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walters Way, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of wooden furniture dumped it's a fire hazard in this heat right next to the houses front door, 25th June
item.description:
This has been here 2 days and is a massive fire hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morpeth Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering on pavements and on railway side of Claremont road, 25th June
item.description:
There is litter on all sides of Claremont road from The corner up to the bus stand - lots by where buses park up - outside houses and by where motorbikes parked Please get this swept away

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Claremont Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Grass verges / Shrub beds - Littering

item.title: Desd decomposing fox, 25th June
item.description:
Hi we've had an awful smell coming over into garden from park and there is what appears to be a decomposing fox . Its behind the walls of houses where the trees are in rear of the park nearer the burnt ash end.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish is being thrown over the fence by the waiting just eat delivery motor cyclists despite the bins being nearby. Thay are also throwing bread from the Gails bakery onto the flat roof of the church, 25th June
item.description:
This have been going on for months

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A dead baby fox in the alleyway leading to Penhill park., 25th June
item.description:
The fox is in-between parked vehicles. This was reported to you on Tuesday but it is still there.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Rowley Avenue, Blendon, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped Pallet, 25th June
item.description:
Fly tipped Pallet
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on both sides of the road, 25th June
item.description:
Rubbish including a black hazardous chemical bottle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southcroft Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial Waste on Pavement, 25th June
item.description:
There is commercial waste from ripped bin bags left on the pavement by shop owners at this location. This is an almost daily occurance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grange Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On Compayne gardens under tree near turn onto Compayne from Canfield Gardens, 25th June
item.description:
The utility cabinet door has been detached for months it is has been temporarily attached with a blue rope but should be fixed properly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Compayne Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 25th June
item.description:
Communal bins are constantly overflowing. They don't have enough capacity, especially in summer. This attracts rats and foxes, with rubbish spread across the driveway, creating a hygiene issue and often blocking access. Please increase collections

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrington Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbours fly tipping near the bus stop, 25th June
item.description:
Some inconsiderate neighbours consistently dumps rubbish in black bin liners near the bus stop. Foxes then spread this rubbish all over at night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crofton Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal tools fly tipped in location ///traded.camps.groups, 25th June
item.description:
Metal fly tipped in location ///traded.camps.groups

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Forest bike, 25th June
item.description:
Inconsiderate person has left a forest bike on the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Murray Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotting food and garden waste, 25th June
item.description:
There is rotting food waste on the street that smells rancid and is attracting pests. Someone has also dumped a large amount of garden waste which is blocking access to the alleyway and spilling over onto the footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Almond Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees are blocking footpath, 25th June
item.description:
These trees have overgrown to the extent they block the footpath accessibility

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vincent Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole sink hole getting deeper every week, 25th June
item.description:
About 15 inches deep now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
